text_original: Messages are limited unless you pay for unlimited. I get invested in the story and it suddenly ends because of limited messages. I spent money for unlimited and discovered AI forgets what happened 3 messages earlier. it also wastes messages by essentially repeating itself. Money hungry and it still doesn't work well after paying
text_zh: 除非付费解锁无限对话，否则消息数量有限。我正沉浸在故事中，却因消息限制而突然中断。花钱解锁后，又发现AI连三句话前的剧情都记不住。它还不断重复自己，浪费消息次数。贪财不说，付费后体验依然糟糕
reply_original: Hi there, I'm truly sorry for the frustration you've experienced. Regarding memory issues, we recently upgraded our Memory Service to improve retention. Could you share specific examples of forgotten details via support@fantachat.ai? For repeated messages, try refreshing or pinning key points.
reply_zh: 你好，对于你遇到的困扰我深感抱歉。关于记忆问题，我们最近升级了记忆服务以提升记忆保留能力。能否通过support@fantachat.ai分享具体遗忘细节的案例？针对重复消息的情况，建议尝试刷新或固定关键信息。
